properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 155/22
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS DAILY IN PERIOND 1000-1500UTC FROM 09NOV TO 11NOV 2022 
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF AND AVOID FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA
  
 A.70-40.10N 015-04.80E
 B.70-04.70N 016-30.70E
 C.69-13.20N 013-52.90E
 D.69-53.40N 012-23.03E
 E.70-40.10N 015-04.80E

 IF TRANSIT THROUGH THE AREA IS NEEDED, ANDOYA SPACE OPERATIONS DESK CAN BE CONTACTED ON 0047 76 14 45 82 
 OR AT MARITIME VHF CH. 14/16 WITH CALLSIGN "ANDOYA SPACE". 
 RADIO AND PHONE IS MANNED FROM 07.00 UTC.
